title: The Silent Bell
summary: The church bell didn't ring at noon. Inside: the sexton dead, the rope cut, and a sealed letter addressed to the Mayor.
location_hint: Expansion case — wire into the world after case 2.

evidence.name: Cut Bell Rope
evidence.description: Clean cut, not frayed. Professional knife work.

evidence.name: Letter to the Mayor
evidence.description: Unopened when found. Inside: proof of a decades-old cover-up tied to the warehouse land.

evidence.name: Faded Photograph
evidence.description: Young Mayor Hart with the sexton — and a third man who vanished in the 90s.

suspects.name: Mayor Hart
suspects.bio: Beloved. Powerful. Suddenly very quiet about the church.

suspects.name: Deputy Cole
suspects.bio: First on scene. Too clean a report, too fast.

suspects.name: Dr. Ellis
suspects.bio: Signed old death certificates. Knows more than she says.

correct.text: The letter would have ended Hart's career — and more. The sexton was going public. Hart silenced the bell and the man who rang it. Mystery Hollow finally sees its own reflection.

wrong_generic.text: You miss the mark. The letter disappears from evidence. Some secrets stay buried under the steeple.
